title: Continuing jurisdiction
doc_html:
Art. 1512.  Continuing jurisdiction

The court exercising juvenile jurisdiction shall have continuing jurisdiction and the exclusive authority to modify its orders rendered pursuant to this Chapter.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §15, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
